parameters.query:
WITH CompletedJobs AS (
  SELECT 
    DISTINCT b.retroid_id,
    e.product_model_name,
    c.joborder_number,
    c.product_quantity
  FROM 
    mes.machine_data a
  JOIN 
    mes.retroid b ON a.retroid_id::int = b.retroid_id
  JOIN 
    mes.joborder c ON b.joborder_id = c.joborder_id
  JOIN 
    mes.product_info d ON c.product_id = d.product_id
  JOIN 
    mes.product_model e ON d.product_model_id = e.product_model_id
  WHERE 
    a.procedure_detail_id = 58
    AND a.createtime BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}' AND '{{ $json.enddate }}'
    AND b.status <> 3
    AND c.status = 1
)
, OverallCompletedCount AS (
  SELECT 
    c.joborder_number,
    COUNT(DISTINCT b.retroid_id) AS total_completed_count
  FROM 
    mes.machine_data a
  JOIN 
    mes.retroid b ON a.retroid_id::int = b.retroid_id
  JOIN 
    mes.joborder c ON b.joborder_id = c.joborder_id
  WHERE 
     a.createtime >= c.createtime
    AND a.procedure_detail_id = 58
    AND b.status <> 3
    AND c.status = 1
  GROUP BY 
    c.joborder_number
)
SELECT 
  cj.retroid_id,
  cj.product_model_name,
  cj.joborder_number,
  cj.product_quantity,
  oc.total_completed_count
FROM 
  CompletedJobs cj
JOIN 
  OverallCompletedCount oc ON cj.joborder_number = oc.joborder_number;

-- 第一步: 获取满足条件的 unique retroid_id 和 jobNumber
WITH RelevantData AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (md.retroid_id)
        md.retroid_id,
        md.data->>'jobNumber' AS jobNumber
    FROM 
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE 
        md.createtime BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}'::timestamp AND '{{ $json.enddate }}'::timestamp
        AND md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
    ORDER BY md.retroid_id
),

-- 第二步: 定义已完成的工单
CompletedJobs AS (
    SELECT 
        DISTINCT b.retroid_id,
        e.product_model_name,
        c.joborder_number,
        c.product_quantity,
        c.joborder_id
    FROM 
        mes.retroid b
    JOIN 
        RelevantData rd ON rd.retroid_id = b.retroid_id
    JOIN 
        mes.joborder c ON rd.jobNumber = c.joborder_number
    JOIN 
        mes.product_info d ON c.product_id = d.product_id
    JOIN 
        mes.product_model e ON d.product_model_id = e.product_model_id
    WHERE 
        b.status <> 3
        AND c.status = 1
),

-- 第三步: 计算每个工单的累积完成数
OverallCompletedCount AS (
    SELECT 
        c.joborder_number,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.retroid_id) AS total_completed_count
    FROM 
        mes.retroid b
    JOIN 
        RelevantData rd ON rd.retroid_id = b.retroid_id
    JOIN 
        mes.joborder c ON rd.jobNumber = c.joborder_number
    WHERE 
        b.status <> 3
        AND c.status = 1
    GROUP BY 
        c.joborder_number
)

-- 最终结果
SELECT 
    cj.retroid_id,
    cj.product_model_name,
    cj.joborder_number,
    cj.product_quantity,
    cj.joborder_id,
    oc.total_completed_count
FROM 
    CompletedJobs cj
JOIN 
    OverallCompletedCount oc ON cj.joborder_number = oc.joborder_number;
